mapper.select: SELECT d.day_id, d.day_number, TO_CHAR(d.trip_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS trip_date, d.memo AS day_memo, i.item_id, i.visit_order, i.start_time, i.end_time, i.memo, p.trip_place_id, p.place_name, p.address, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.category_name, img.image_id, img.image_url, img.member_id FROM trip_day d LEFT JOIN itinerary_item i ON i.day_id = d.day_id LEFT JOIN trip_place p ON p.trip_place_id = i.trip_place_id LEFT JOIN itinerary_image img ON i.item_id = img.item_id WHERE d.trip_id = #{tripId} ORDER BY d.day_number ASC, i.visit_order ASC, img.image_id ASC

SELECT DISTINCT p.trip_place_id, p.place_name, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.category_name, p.address FROM trip t JOIN trip_day d ON d.trip_id = t.trip_id JOIN itinerary_item i ON i.day_id = d.day_id JOIN trip_place p ON p.trip_place_id = i.trip_place_id WHERE t.trip_id = #{tripId} AND t.is_public = 1
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO trip_place dst USING ( SELECT #{memberId,jdbcType=NUMERIC} AS member_id, #{placeName} AS place_name, #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS address, #{latitude} AS latitude, #{longitude} AS longitude FROM DUAL ) src ON ( (dst.member_id = src.member_id OR (dst.member_id IS NULL AND src.member_id IS NULL)) AND dst.place_name = src.place_name AND dst.address = src.address ) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( member_id, api_place_id, place_name, address, latitude, longitude, category_name, place_url, created_at ) VALUES ( #{memberId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{apiContentId}, #{placeName}, #{address}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{category}, #{imageUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT trip_place_id FROM trip_place WHERE api_place_id = #{apiContentId} AND ROWNUM = 1
SELECT trip_place_id FROM trip_place WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND ABS(latitude - #{lat}) < 0.000001 AND ABS(longitude - #{lng}) < 0.000001 AND ROWNUM = 1

SELECT trip_place_id AS placeId, member_id AS memberId, api_place_id AS apiContentId, place_name AS placeName, address, latitude, longitude, category_name AS category, place_url AS imageUrl, CASE WHEN member_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isCustom FROM trip_place WHERE api_place_id = #{apiContentId} AND ROWNUM = 1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT trip_place_id AS placeId, member_id AS memberId, place_name AS placeName, address, latitude, longitude, category_name AS category, place_url AS imageUrl, api_place_id AS apiContentId, CASE WHEN member_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isCustom FROM trip_place WHERE (member_id IS NULL OR member_id = #{currentMemberId})
AND UPPER(category_name) = UPPER(#{category})
AND REGEXP_LIKE(address, REPLACE(#{cityKeyword}, ',', '|'))
ORDER BY DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{limit}

SELECT trip_place_id AS placeId, member_id AS memberId, place_name AS placeName, address, latitude, longitude, category_name AS category, place_url AS imageUrl, api_place_id AS apiContentId, CASE WHEN member_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isCustom FROM trip_place WHERE (member_id IS NULL OR member_id = #{currentMemberId}) AND ( UPPER(place_name) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(address) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN member_id = #{currentMemberId} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, place_name FETCH FIRST 30 ROWS ONLY

SELECT trip_place_id AS placeId, member_id AS memberId, place_name AS placeName, address, latitude, longitude, category_name AS category, place_url AS imageUrl, api_place_id AS apiContentId, 1 AS isCustom FROM trip_place WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT trip_place_id AS placeId, member_id AS memberId, place_name AS placeName, address, latitude, longitude, category_name AS category, place_url AS imageUrl, api_place_id AS apiContentId, CASE WHEN member_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isCustom FROM trip_place WHERE trip_place_id = #{placeId} AND (member_id IS NULL OR member_id = #{currentMemberId})
